summary: Completed comprehensive testing of luxury perfume e-commerce application. Backend APIs fully functional (26/26 tests passed). Frontend mostly working with some authentication and navigation issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin login fails to redirect after successful authentication

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access admin panel due to login redirect failure

design_issues.issue: Products take time to load, showing 'Loading products...' state

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin login redirect issue - admin credentials authenticate successfully via API but frontend login form doesn't redirect properly. Check login form submission handling and authentication state management for admin users.
